UD JURY TRIALS

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-10-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Quidachay; Clerk: M. Olopernes; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Devendra Patel is present.
Attorney Michael Rossoff for the plaintiff.
Defendants Emory Tanner Phillips II and Nikki Renee Phillips are present.
Attorney Jennifer Gould appearing for defendants in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Elan Lambert, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of JUL-15-2013 is vacated. (501/JPT)
